qa_h3_5: A Gift of Meaning for the Next Generation
qa_p_10: At FAMILYPASTPORT, we understand that the process
qa_p_11: Everything you need to know about our family documentation services, from the very first step to receiving your perfect family keepsake.
qa_p_12: Our service is suitable  for everyone! No matter what your background is. Whether you lived a quiet life or an extraordinary one, a life behind the scenes or one spent in the spotlight, your story deserves to be preserved. Everyone has a unique life story to tell. Specially tailored for seniors and their family members.
qa_p_13: The process begins with a short and pleasant introductory phone call, at no cost. During this call, we will understand your family's needs, explain the various service plans, and schedule an initial consultation at your home, our office, or via Zoom. We believe that a personal connection is the foundation of successful and secure guidance.
qa_p_14: No. We welcome anyone who wishes to turn their memories and stories into a film or book.
qa_p_15: Absolutely. We encourage the participation of younger family members. Your presence provides reassurance and strengthens the intergenerational experience. Together, we can bring up shared memories, ask guiding questions, and create an especially rich and moving documentation. This is a wonderful opportunity to strengthen family bonds.
qa_p_16: The duration of the process varies depending on the scope of the chosen service. A basic documentation session typically lasts between two to three hours, while a comprehensive documentation project may span several sessions. We personalize the schedule individually, with full consideration for the comfort and energy level of the elderly participant, without any pressure.
qa_p_17: Without a doubt. Our documentation services have become the most moving and meaningful gift for milestone birthdays, such as a 70th or 80th birthday gift. This is a gift that is not measured by its monetary value, but by the immense emotional value it brings to the entire family. We also offer elegant gift vouchers that allow you to choose the most convenient date.
qa_p_18: This is the cornerstone of our work. We know how to listen, to be patient, and to guide the conversation gently, while fully respecting personal and emotional boundaries. Sensitive topics are handled with the utmost care, maintaining a safe and respectful atmosphere throughout the entire session.
qa_p_19: We understand the desire to immortalize your life story for future generations. Our documentation process is personalized, sensitive, and patient, designed to provide you with a comfortable and respectful experience. We invite you to a no-obligation introductory call, to hear about your experiences and explain how we can help.
qa_p_20: Looking for an original and moving gift for parents or grandparents? Family documentation is much more than a gift – it's an investment in family memory. Contact us today, and we'll show you how you can give your loved ones an unforgettable gift that connects generations.
qa_p_21: If your question hasn't been answered, the FAMILYPASTPORT team will be happy to help. Leave your details and we'll get back to you shortly.
home_h2_3: What will the next generations know about your loved ones?
home_h3_5: We invite you to give your family the most precious gift of all — a connection to the past
home_p_16: Our Services The most popular gift A special gift for a loved one Personal memory preservation
home_p_17: We guide you through every step of documenting your family's story, with professionalism, sensitivity, and integrity
home_p_18: A digital and personal package including recorded interviews, selected photos, historical documents, and family stories
home_p_19: A family documentary film, 12–20 minutes long, combining interviews, archival photos, drone footage, and an original soundtrack
home_p_20: A guided and filmed gathering that brings together different generations of the family — grandparents, parents, and children — for a conversation about roots and memories
home_p_21: In-depth genealogical research uncovering the family's roots — immigration, migration, names, dates, and stories
home_p_22: A service for locating, restoring, and obtaining historical documents — birth certificates, marriage certificates, old passports, and immigration records
home_p_23: Professional digital restoration of old, damaged, or faded photos — repairing tears, removing stains, sharpening details, and digital colorization
home_p_24: Family stories are the most precious treasure we leave behind. The small moments, the memories, the experiences that shaped the lives of our loved ones — all of these can fade with time if not properly documented. At Family PastPort, we believe every family deserves to have their story told and preserved.
home_p_25: Modern technology allows us to document everything, yet the most personal and authentic stories are often the ones left behind. Family PastPort was born from the understanding that memories are not just photos in an album — they are voices, scents, stories passed down from generation to generation. We create a living, breathing record of your family's heritage.
home_p_26: Through a unique combination of human sensitivity, in-depth research, and advanced technology, we build a living bridge between your family's past, present, and future. Every story is documented with respect, love, and professionalism — so that future generations can truly know those who came before them.
home_p_27: Contact FAMILYPASTPORT for a relaxed introductory conversation and personalized guidance on the service best suited to your family's needs. We are here to support you every step of the way.
new_p_105: From the start, a personal project manager will be assigned to you, who will coordinate and handle your project from beginning to end and will be available to answer any questions you may have.
new_p_108: We will hold the copyright until your film is completed, paid in full, and transferred to you. After that, the copyright of the film will be yours. You can also receive the raw footage from which the editing was made.
new_p_111: We will postpone your remaining interviews until you are well enough to continue, and reschedule them according to your recovery and availability. If you become too ill to continue or do not wish to complete the project for any reason, you may cancel the contract. This must be done in writing, in accordance with our terms and conditions.

about_h1_1: Your family story, documented with love and professionalism
about_h2_3: Irit Filipovich – Senior Archivist and Founder of Family PastPort
about_p_18:
At FAMILYPASTPORT, we believe that every family is a unique story worthy of meticulous documentation. We guide you through an organized, patient, and sensitive process, paying attention to every detail — so that the memories and documents precious to you are preserved for generations to come.

Every documentation project is personally tailored to the family's character, values, and the stories it wishes to immortalize. The result is a digital and printed album and a documentary film.
  A treasure of identity, belonging, and inspiration for future generations.
about_p_19:
As an archivist, I have dedicated most of my professional life to the craft of documentation. Having led the Archives Division at Yad Vashem and managed leading companies in the fields of archiving and information management, I learned that behind every piece of information, document, or photograph, lies an entire world of emotion, identity, and human history.
For me, an archive is not merely a collection of papers, but a living mosaic of human destinies and a living bridge between the past and the future. The experience I have gained in knowledge management allows me to approach the task of family documentation with the highest professional standards.
The combination of my professional experience and the visual digital tools we employ allows us to offer you a moving experience and personalized family documentation: from heritage films and roots books, to lightweight and accessible technological solutions that immortalize family memory.
At Family PastPort, I bring all the knowledge I have accumulated to ensure that your story is documented and told, so that future generations will know where they came from and carry your name with pride. 
🏛️Former Head of the Archives Division - Yad Vashem           📚Expert in Knowledge Management and Archival Research
about_p_21: We accompany families with attentive care  and help them document the significant milestones in their lives – from photo albums to documents – before time passes. We consider it a privilege to be partners in your journey, and to provide you with peace of mind and the certainty that everything is properly documented.
about_p_22: Through six dedicated services, we provide a comprehensive suite of family documentation solutions, combining professionalism, reliability, and human warmth.
about_p_24: At FAMILYPASTPORT, we believe that every family journey begins with respect, sensitivity, and a deep connection between generations. Our values are the compass that guides every service we provide.
about_p_25: We see in every document a complete life story. Every document is handled with loving hands and deep respect for your family heritage.
about_p_26: We understand the unique needs of older adults. Our service is specially tailored to your pace, with endless patience, clear explanations, and close guidance every step of the way.
about_p_27: We believe that family documentation is the bridge that connects grandparents to grandchildren. Every one of our services is designed to strengthen the intergenerational bond and ensure that family heritage is passed from generation to generation.
about_p_28: We are committed to the highest standards of accuracy, reliability, and professionalism.
about_p_29: Accompanying you step by step on the path to perfect family documentation
about_p_30: We will get to know you and your family story. We will understand your needs, dreams, and wishes for documentation. Together we will build an initial vision for a project that reflects your family heritage.
about_p_31: We will embark on a shared journey of collecting memories, photos, and documents. We will guide you through a structured and sensitive process, and help you uncover the stories behind the pictures — the moments that made you a family.
about_p_32: We will process, design, and assemble a polished and impressive family documentation for you. The final product will be organized, accessible, and personalized — a keepsake that will be passed from generation to generation, one that every family member can connect with.

contact_h2_3: In Safe Hands - Discreet, Sensitive and Patient
contact_h3_4: What Should You Include in Your Message?
contact_p_12: We invite you to get in touch with FAMILYPASSPORT. We'd love to hear about your idea for a family documentation project, a special milestone gift for a 70th or 80th birthday, or any question regarding our documentation and travel services. Reach out to us for a relaxed, no-obligation conversation.
contact_p_13: Our team is here to listen, advise, and tailor the most suitable service path for you. Every inquiry is received with personal attention, with the understanding that every family has its own unique story.
contact_p_14: We are here to assist you with any question or request. Fill out the form and we will get back to you as soon as possible.
contact_p_15: Call us for an initial consultation with no commitment. We'll be happy to answer any question and tailor the service to your family's needs.
contact_p_16: Send us a detailed inquiry on any matter related to family documentation, passports, or visas. We are committed to a professional and prompt response.
contact_p_17: Prefer a personal conversation? Schedule a short introductory meeting where we'll understand your needs, explain the process, and build a customized action plan together.
contact_p_18: We understand that behind every document lies a family story. Every inquiry is handled with dedication, ensuring complete privacy and a warm personal touch. Our team of experts guides you every step of the way, patiently explaining each stage, and making sure the process is simple, clear, and worry-free. Whether it involves complex family documentation or searching for archival records — you and your family are at the center of everything we do.

services_h2_3: Not sure which service is right for your family?
services_p_18: A digital and personal package including recorded interviews, selected photos, historical documents, and family stories — all wrapped in an interactive viewing experience for intergenerational transfer.
services_p_20: A 12–20 minute family documentary film, combining family member interviews, archival photos, drone footage, and an original soundtrack — your life story on the big screen.
services_p_22: A guided and filmed session that brings together different generations of the family — grandparents, parents, and children — for a conversation about roots, memories, and values. The result: a moving documentation of family wisdom passed from generation to generation.
services_p_24: In-depth genealogical research uncovering family roots — immigration, migration, names, dates, and stories — including access to international databases, original certificates, and the construction of a detailed family tree.
services_p_26: A service for locating, restoring, and obtaining historical documents — birth, marriage, and death certificates, old passports, immigration certificates, and migration documents — from anywhere in the world, navigating international bureaucracy.
services_p_28: Professional digital restoration of old, damaged, or faded photos — repairing tears, removing stains, sharpening details, digital colorization, and producing high-quality copies for printing and preservation for generations.
services_p_30: At FAMILYPASTPORT, we guide families through a personal and in-depth documentation process. We transform photos, stories, and documents into an organized and authentic family legacy — one that tells your story exactly as it is, without unnecessary noise, and gives you a meaningful gift that passes from generation to generation.
services_p_31: You simply enjoy the result — we take care of everything else.
services_p_32: Every album or documentation becomes a bridge connecting the generations in the family — grandparents, parents, and children.
services_p_33: An emotional alternative to familiar gifts — a gift that tells your family story, personal and unforgettable.
services_p_35: Every family journey is unique, and so are your documentation needs. Our professional team will be happy to listen, understand your family's specific needs, and recommend the most suitable service — whether it's comprehensive family documentation, a special gift for a 70th or 80th birthday, or guidance through the document retrieval process. Leave your details and we'll get back to you, with no obligation.

about_seo_twitter_title: Meet the Experts Behind Family Documentation — FAMILYPASTPORT
home_seo_og_description:
Looking for family documentation? FAMILYPASTPORT preserves your loved ones' memories forever. Memory preservation is more than a gift — it's a meaningful experience
Documented stories and family research are more than a gift. It's a meaningful experience for someone you love. We will gently guide them through the story of their lives, and help them recall the moments that shaped who they are and the wisdom they carry. Their precious memories and photos will be woven into a film that preserves their voice, character, and the legacy they wish to pass on. Who is this for? For those who want to tell their family history, summarize life milestones and career achievements, and leave a legacy for future generations.
legal_accessibility_p_9:
FAMILYPASTPORT is committed to making its services accessible to the general public. We work to implement the Israeli Standard 
            (IS 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 guidelines at level AA.
about_seo_og_description: At FAMILYPASTPORT, we understand that family documentation is a precious gift. Read about the dedicated team that transforms every moment into a moving family experience.
contact_meta_description: Ready to turn the family documentation into a touching 80th birthday gift? Contact FAMILYPASTPORT today for a personal consultation, a price quote, and the beginning of your family experience.
legal_accessibility_p_10:
We believe in equal rights and in every person's right to receive information and services independently and equally. 
            This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.
legal_accessibility_p_11: The website complies with level AA of the WCAG 2.1 standard, which includes:
legal_accessibility_p_13: We continuously work to improve the accessibility of the website and update it in accordance with technological developments and user feedback.
legal_accessibility_p_14: If you encountered an accessibility issue on the website or need assistance, please contact us:
legal_accessibility_p_15: Response times: We will respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve them within 10 business days.
legal_accessibility_p_16: Complaints: A complaint may be submitted to the Ministry of Justice - Commission for Equal Rights of Persons with Disabilities

what_people_say_about_us_p_7: Many families have chosen us to accompany them on their family documentation journey. We are proud to share their experiences with you — moments of connection, preserving memories, and creating a family legacy for generations to come.
what_people_say_about_us_p_8: Every story begins with a single dream — to preserve the family story, to ensure that future generations can. At FAMILYPASTPORT, we specialize in turning that into a moving and empowering family experience.

what_people_say_about_us_quote_47: The service from FAMILYPASTPORT was simply exceptional. They organized all of my grandparents' photos and documents ahead of their golden wedding anniversary, and everything was ready on time and without any worries. The feeling of knowing that everything is handled by true professionals is simply a gift.
what_people_say_about_us_quote_48: I was looking for a special gift for my father's 80th birthday, and the family album we created together with the team was moving to tears. They knew how to combine the old photos with the stories in such a natural and elegant way. My father couldn't stop being moved by it for weeks.
what_people_say_about_us_quote_49: We ordered Family PastPort as a gift for my father's 80th birthday. The interviewer came, sat with him for three hours, and my father shared things we had never heard before. About the border, about the kibbutz, about his mother who was killed in the war. In the end, we received a deeply moving film. It is the best gift we have ever given him.
what_people_say_about_us_quote_50:
We ordered the "Time Capsule" as a gift for mom's 70th birthday. The process was simple and experiential, and the result — wow!
It was a moving and powerful experience that our whole family went through together. Mom felt like a queen.
what_people_say_about_us_quote_51:
We used FAMILYPASTPORT's service to search for my grandfather's documents

for obtaining a European passport

. We received fast, courteous, and precise service. It was truly professional detective work. We couldn't help but be impressed by the vast knowledge in archival research. I warmly recommend it to anyone searching for family documents in archives.
